messages.text: We need to settle the rate limiting approach for the public API before the v2 freeze. Options on the table: fixed-window counters in Redis, or the token bucket library we prototyped.
Token bucket handles bursts way better, and we already run Redis for sessions so the operational overhead is basically zero.
+1 token bucket. Fixed windows gave us those thundering-herd spikes at the top of every minute in the last load test.
Decision: we're going with token bucket rate limiting backed by Redis, starting at 100 requests/min per API key. Dev will implement the middleware by Friday, and Priya owns the load tests next week.
Phoenix launch emails — we need to pick a transactional email provider this week. SendGrid has the best free tier and half the team has used it before.
Fine by me. Their template editor is decent and the Node SDK is solid.
OK, decided: Phoenix will use SendGrid for transactional email. Jonas, please set up the account and domain authentication this week.

Update on the SendGrid setup: deliverability to Outlook has been rough in testing — about 12% of our test sends landed in spam. I trialed Postmark and the same batch delivered clean, plus their support answered in under an hour.
That's a launch risk we can't take. Switching it: Phoenix will use Postmark instead of SendGrid for transactional email. Jonas, migrate the templates by Wednesday and I'll update the budget sheet.
On it. RIP the SendGrid setup 🫡
Thoughts on the onboarding redesign? I mocked up both directions: a progressive-disclosure flow and the classic checklist approach. Figma links in the project doc.
Checklist feels safer for activation metrics, but the progressive flow demoed noticeably better with last month's user tests. Honestly torn.
Same here. Let's get more signal from next week's user interviews before we commit either way.
Agreed, let's revisit after the interviews wrap.
Anyone else's badge not working on the 4th floor this morning?
Facilities says the reader is being replaced today, should be back by lunch.
Reminder: demo day pizza on Thursday 🍕 RSVP in the calendar invite so we order enough.
